title: Grand Prairie Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Grand Prairie with a Z-Score of +3.40. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Grand Prairie is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Z-Score of +3.40, indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.9 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, showing the intense heat. 
 The humidity is at 38% and the wind speed is at 7.3 km/h, making the conditions even more unbearable.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
